chunks.title: Description of Desolation
chunks.reason: Describes the physical and social devastation of Jerusalem by enemy nations.

chunks.title: Lament and Plea for Wrath
chunks.reason: Contains a rhetorical question about God's anger and a request for judgment on the nations.

chunks.title: Prayer for Deliverance and Vengeance
chunks.reason: A cohesive petition asking God to remember mercy, deliver the people, and vindicate His name.

chunks.title: Vow of Praise
chunks.reason: A concluding declaration of gratitude and commitment to praise God as His people.
